title: polygala refracta
intro: Polygala refracta, also known as Polygala, is a plant species within the milkwort family (Polygalaceae) that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant's root and leaves have been found to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat a range of health conditions. The health benefits of Polygala refracta include its potential to improve kidney function, boost the immune system, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, Polygala refracta is often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
